key_insights: Why it matters: Laguna S 2.1 is cheaper than Deepseek v4 Flash and better than V4 Pro.
What changed: We can’t put it better than one of the Redditors you’ll see below: Cheaper than Deepseek v4 Flash, Better than V4 Pro.
What to watch: For DeepSeek, Benchmarks, Inference, look for concrete timing, affected users, product details, or independent confirmation.

sources.title: Laguna S 2.1 Released: Cheaper than Deepseek v4 Flash, Better than V4 Pro"

cards.summary: Laguna S 2.1 is a 118B-A8B model targeting local inference on high-memory systems, with reported benchmark scores of 70.2% on Terminal-Bench 2.1, 78.5% on SWE-bench Multilingual, 59.4% on SWE-Bench Pro, 40.4% on DeepSWE, 46.2% on SWE Atlas Codebase Q&A, and 49.7% on Toolathlon Verified.
cards.title: Laguna S 2.1 Released: Cheaper than Deepseek v4 Flash, Better than V4 Pro
